module_page_flow: Module at a glance (50 words): qualification level, word count, number of ACs, pathway
Scenario disclosure: which case study/scenario is used (students verify compatibility)
AC navigation table: jump links to each Assessment Criterion covered
AC sections (H2 per AC, verbatim CIPD question as heading text)
H2: Related [Level X] Modules (3-4 internal links to adjacent module pages)
level_hub_page_flow: H1: CIPD Level [X] Assignment Examples — [Qualification Name]
What is CIPD Level [X]? (200 words: qualification structure, pathways, assessment format)
Complete Module List (ItemList markup) — organised by pathway
Most Popular Examples (cards for top 3-4 modules)
What to expect in each example (format description)
FAQ: How long are Level [X] assignments? / What grade do I need? / Are these CIPD-accredited?
outer_section_page_flow: Key components / types / models (specific, named, connected)
Application in CIPD context (how this concept appears in specific assignments)
Contextual bridge: explicit link to relevant Core module page with bridge sentence
Related concepts (2-3 internal links to adjacent Outer pages)
